query: SELECT id, action_type, title, description, reasoning, suggested_value, current_value, campaign_id, campaign_name, risk_level, status, created_at FROM autonomous_actions WHERE status IN ('pending_approval', 'approved', 'pending') ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 50;
